state.coderResponse:
All verification checks pass. Let me confirm the final implementation summary:

**Implementation complete.** Two new files created in the existing `internal/git` package:

- **`internal/git/diff.go`** — plain `package git` line (line 15, after a file-level comment mirroring `plumbing.go`), stdlib-only import (`strings`), defines:
  - `type DiffSettings struct { MaxMdLines int; MaxDiffBytes int }` with godoc citing FR1–FR5, decisions.md §6, plan_overview.md §2.2
  - `func capLines(s string, n int) string` — head -n N equivalent (byte-loop, inclusive Nth newline)
  - `func capBytes(s string, n int) string` — head -c N equivalent
  - `func (g *Git) StagedDiff(cfg DiffSettings) (string, error)` — by-value clamp to defaults (100/300000), md capture per-file with per-file line cap, single other command with TOTAL byte cap, exact contract pathspec tokens verbatim (including literal no-star `:!.md`/`:!.markdown`), md+other concatenation no separator, `("", nil)` on empty. Godoc cites PRD §22.3/§19, reference_impl.md §1, external_deps.md §D, decisions.md §9, FR1–FR5.

- **`internal/git/diff_test.go`** — white-box `package git`, stdlib `fmt`/`strings`/`testing` only, composes the S2 harness, drives the real git binary. All 5 contract scenarios PASS.

**Validation gates (all green):**
| Gate | Result |
|---|---|
| L1 `go build ./internal/git/` | OK |
| L2 `go vet ./internal/git/` | clean |
| L3 `test -z "$(gofmt -l internal/git/)"` | clean |
| L4 `go test ./internal/git/` | PASS (5 diff + S1/S2/T2 = 21 tests) |
| L5 `go test ./...` / `make test` | whole-module green |

**Scope/boundaries respected:** only the 2 new files exist; no tracked file modified; `go.mod`/`go.sum` untouched; `// Package git` doc appears exactly once (in `git.go`); no go-git/dep added; no `go mod tidy`; no README/docs/TOML.

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "Implemented P1.M3.T3.S1: created internal/git/diff.go (plain `package git`, stdlib-only import `strings`) defining exported `DiffSettings{MaxMdLines int; MaxDiffBytes int}`, unexported `capLines` (head -n N) and `capBytes` (head -c N) helpers, and `func (g *Git) StagedDiff(cfg DiffSettings) (string, error)`. StagedDiff faithfully ports the commit-pi md-vs-other capture: by-value clamp of non-positive cfg to defaults (100/300000); markdown captured PER-FILE via `git diff --cached -- <file>` head -n capped per-file then concatenated; everything-else captured in ONE `git diff --cached --` invocation with the EXACT contract exclusion pathspec tokens (including the faithful literal no-star `:!.md`/`:!.markdown`) head -c capped TOTAL; concatenated markdown-first with no separator; returns (\"\", nil) — NOT an error — when nothing staged. Created internal/git/diff_test.go (white-box `package git`, stdlib testing only) covering all 5 contract MOCKING scenarios via the shipped S2 harness + the REAL git binary. All 5 validation gates pass: go build OK, go vet clean, gofmt empty, go test ./internal/git/ PASS (5 new + 16 existing S1/S2/T2 tests), go test ./... whole-module green. Scope boundaries verified: only the 2 new files created; git.go/git_test.go/gittestutil_test.go/plumbing*.go, main.go, Makefile, go.mod, go.sum, internal/ui, internal/provider unchanged; no go-git/testify/dep added; no go mod tidy; `// Package git` appears exactly once (in git.go); Mode A godoc on DiffSettings and StagedDiff cites PRD §22.3/§19, reference_impl.md §1, external_deps.md §D, decisions.md §9, FR1-FR5."
}
```
